name: auth's RNG
description: a browser-based RNG/incremental game with tons of unique and cool features
author: auth

name: Nova RNG
description: Nova RNG is a browser-based random number generator game with upgradeable mechanics, themes, and background music. Players roll to earn points, unlock upgrades, and track stats. The game includes full settings for volume control, themes, and auto-roll preferences.
author: Nova
